name: EPIC-7 Hero Pages

stories.title: Backend foundation — 5 new FastAPI routes (metrics/queue/providers/onboarding + kits list)
stories.evidence: 326 pytest passing (305 prior + 21 new, zero regression); 4 routers registered in main.py:13-20+49-52; routes inventory ≥13; grep_providers exit 0
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api/routes/metrics.py: GET /api/metrics/weekly returns {kits_this_week:int, avg_compliance:float|None, avg_manual_edit_min:float|None, api_spend_usd_mtd:float, sparks:{kits:list[int], compliance:list[float], cost:list[float]}} — aggregates from existing marketing_kits + compliance_checks + cost_events tables. ISO-week window. Pydantic response_model. Pytest: tests/api/test_metrics.py covers empty-DB + seeded-data cases.

apps/api/routes/kits.py extended with GET /api/kits?recent=true&limit=N — returns {items: [{id, sku, name, name_en?, status, score, locale, thumbs:list[hexstr|null]}], total}. JOIN product_catalogs for sku/name; LATEST N rows by created_at DESC. Pytest: tests/api/test_kits_list.py.

apps/api/routes/queue.py: GET /api/queue/active — snapshots in-process queue state via services.imagegen.orchestrator (active+queued jobs). Returns [{kit_id, sku, name, locale, stages:[done|active|queued]*5, current_stage:str, eta_ms:int}]. Empty list when no orchestrator state. Pytest: tests/api/test_queue_active.py with monkeypatched orchestrator state.

apps/api/routes/providers.py: POST /api/providers/endpoints (req: {new_yaml, expected_sha256}) → 200 {new_sha256} on success, 503 {code:'ERR-CFG-001', retry_after_s:2} + Retry-After header on ConfigLockTimeout, 409 {code:'ERR-CFG-004', current_yaml, current_sha256} on ConfigChecksumMismatch, 409 {code:'ERR-CFG-002', current_yaml} on ConfigInodeChanged. CONSUMES existing apps/api/lib/config_io.py read/write API. Pytest: tests/api/test_providers_endpoints.py for happy + 409 + 503 + 409-inode paths.

apps/api/routes/providers.py also exposes: GET /api/providers/health — returns [{endpoint_id, role, status, latency_ms, last_check, unbound?:bool}] derived from registry + last health-probe (stub OK if probe not run yet). GET /api/providers/summary — returns {endpoints_count, monthly_cap_usd, brand_color, default_locale, export_preset} from current config.yaml. Pytest covers both.

apps/api/routes/onboarding.py: GET /api/onboarding/needed → {needs_onboarding: bool}. Predicate runs EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE password_hash IS NOT NULL AND length(password_hash) > 0). Pytest: tests/api/test_onboarding_needed.py covers 0-rows, real-hash, and partial-row (NULL password_hash) — schema CHECK forbids NULL hash so partial-row case is asserted as 'cannot happen at DB level' + predicate still correct.
apps/api/main.py registers all new routers (metrics, queue, providers, onboarding) WITHOUT touching existing health/copywriter/kits/retrieval registrations. Startup fail-loud preserved.
uv run pytest -q passes; prior 305 tests + new tests all green (no regression).
bash scripts/grep_providers.sh exits 0 (no vendor names leaked outside config.yaml).

stories.title: Frontend dependency + tooling foundation (deps, tailwind extend, nav, i18n)
stories.evidence: Most deliverables pre-existed; agent's only diff was collapsing the multi-line 'fade-in-stagger' string in tailwind.config.ts for Biome compliance. pnpm install/typecheck/lint/check:tokens all exit 0
acceptanceCriteria: apps/web/package.json: add react-markdown@^9.0.0, remark-gfm@^4.0.0, react-diff-view@^3.0.0, @formatjs/intl-localematcher@^0.5.0. pnpm install succeeds.

apps/web/tailwind.config.ts: extend keyframes['fade-in'] = {from: {opacity: 0}, to: {opacity: 1}}; extend animation['fade-in-stagger'] = 'fade-in 240ms ease-out calc(var(--i) * 80ms) forwards'. No other restructuring of tailwind.config.ts. pnpm check:tokens still passes.
apps/web/lib/nav.ts: flip providers.enabled = true; drop comingInEpic on providers item. editor stays comingInEpic: 5. All others unchanged.

apps/web/messages/zh.json + apps/web/messages/en.json: add kitDetail.*, providers.*, providersDialog.*, onboarding.* keys covering all visible strings the new pages will render (≥30 keys per locale, mirrored).
pnpm typecheck + pnpm lint clean after these changes (no new TS errors).

stories.title: Frontend hero pages + components (Dashboard / Kit Detail / Providers / Onboarding)
stories.evidence: 4 hero pages + 18 components + 5 new hooks shipped. typecheck/lint/check:tokens/build/gen:api/grep_providers all exit 0. pnpm gen:api captured 12 paths (5 prior + 7 new EPIC-7). First-load JS: dashboard 168kB, kits/[id] 210kB, providers 192kB, onboarding 147kB. Sankey custom SVG 166 LOC, zero new viz deps. CSS-only fade-in-stagger via tailwind keyframes. shadcn primitives reused.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/web/app/[locale]/dashboard/page.tsx: REPLACE the Placeholder with full Dashboard port — renders KPI strip (4 KPICards via /api/metrics/weekly), Recent Kits 3-col grid (6 KitCards via /api/kits?recent=true&limit=6), Queue strip (queue rows via /api/queue/active). Sidebar + Topbar still wrap layout.

apps/web/app/[locale]/kits/[id]/page.tsx: NEW route. Renders 14-image grid (5 hero + 9 detail via existing /api/kits/{id} response shape), SpecMarkdown column, CompliancePanel (uses ComplianceRing atom), CostDock (per-role breakdown). Pending state when score/cost NULL. SSE subscription to /api/kits/{id}/events updates the grid; new images enter with fade-in-stagger.

apps/web/app/[locale]/providers/page.tsx: NEW route. Renders custom SVG SankeyRouting (~150 LOC, zero deps) showing 5 roles → endpoints; EndpointTable; AddEndpointModal; ConflictResolutionDialog (mounted invisibly, opens on 409). Read-only YAML view via shadcn Tabs.

apps/web/app/[locale]/onboarding/page.tsx: NEW route. Renders hero copy, 3 OnboardingCTA cards (new kit / sample kit / providers), WorkspaceReadyCard pulling from /api/providers/summary + /api/providers/health.
apps/web/components/dashboard/{KitCard,KPICard,QueueRow,QueueProgress}.tsx exist and pass Biome + tsc strict.
apps/web/components/kit-detail/{ImageGrid,SpecMarkdown,CompliancePanel,CostDock}.tsx exist; SpecMarkdown wires react-markdown@9 + remark-gfm@4 with custom h1/h2/h3/p/code/table renderers.

apps/web/components/providers/{SankeyRouting,ChipOverlay,EndpointTable,AddEndpointModal,ConflictResolutionDialog,DiffPane}.tsx exist; SankeyRouting is ≤200 LOC custom SVG; ConflictResolutionDialog uses react-diff-view + shadcn Dialog; ChipOverlay renders conditionally on unbound['compliance_screen'].
apps/web/components/onboarding/{WorkspaceReadyCard,OnboardingCTA}.tsx exist.

apps/web/hooks/{use-weekly-metrics,use-recent-kits,use-queue-active,use-providers-health,use-providers-summary,use-config-save}.ts exist; each typed against the locally-declared response shape (since pnpm gen:api fills paths once routes ship in S1).
pnpm gen:api succeeds and captures the new routes (≥12 paths total).
pnpm typecheck + pnpm lint + pnpm check:tokens all clean. pnpm build succeeds (4+ new routes; first-load JS reported).
bash scripts/grep_providers.sh clean (no vendor leaks in any new component).

stories.title: Onboarding gate middleware + /api/onboarding/needed wiring
stories.evidence: apps/web/middleware.ts:1-66 — BARE_ROOT_PATHS set ({/, /zh, /en}); intl-localematcher locale resolution; fetch /api/onboarding/needed with cache:no-store + safe default; locale-aware rewrite (zh no prefix, en under /en); delegates non-root to next-intl middleware. pnpm typecheck/lint/build all exit 0. Edge runtime bundle = 39.6kB.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/web/middleware.ts: matcher ['/', '/zh', '/en']; intercepts root requests; fetches NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL + /api/onboarding/needed (cache: 'no-store'); resolves locale via @formatjs/intl-localematcher from Accept-Language (default 'zh'); rewrites to /[locale]/onboarding or /[locale]/dashboard.
Behavior: empty users table → /onboarding; non-empty (real bcrypt hash) → /dashboard; partial-row case (DB-impossible per CHECK constraint — middleware still correct per predicate).
Existing /[locale]/page.tsx remains as the fallback for direct /[locale] access (redirects to /dashboard); middleware only intercepts root + /zh + /en bare-locale paths.
pnpm typecheck clean (middleware.ts valid Edge runtime types).

stories.title: Seed fixtures + Makefile target (seed_dashboard_fixtures.py)
stories.evidence: seed_dashboard_fixtures.py pre-existed (idempotent: run 1 inserts 6/30/54/24, run 2 inserts 0/0/0/0); 4 new pytest in tests/scripts/; Makefile seed-fixtures + seed-dashboard-fixtures targets added; orchestrator-only vendor leak post-fix: scripts/seed_dashboard_fixtures.py:121-124 renamed to protocol-family names (openai_compatible/anthropic_compatible); grep_providers exits 0
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/seed_dashboard_fixtures.py: idempotent (rerun produces byte-identical DB rows). Inserts: 6 deterministic product_catalogs + marketing_kits + 14 hero/detail images per kit with placeholder png_path; 1 weekly_metrics-equivalent (via inserting deterministic cost_events + compliance_checks across the ISO week); 4 queue_jobs (whatever orchestrator state needs); 5 provider_endpoints via writing a known apps/api/lib/config_io target (or test fixture config) — DEFER if better to rely on config.yaml.example; 0 users (so onboarding gate test runs).
Makefile target: seed-fixtures: seed-sample-kit seed-dashboard-fixtures — chains existing seed-sample-kit (Makefile:47-49) + new script.
Pytest smoke test in tests/scripts/test_seed_dashboard_fixtures.py: run twice, assert no duplicates inserted, assert known counts (6 kits / 84 images / 0 users).
PYTHONPATH-aware subprocess invocation per memory feedback_subprocess_pythonpath.md.

stories.title: Playwright e2e + visual regression specs (baselines TBD)
stories.evidence: 10 new spec files + 6 mock helpers + globalSetup hook + 4 EPIC-7 full-page visual baselines. typecheck/lint clean. 58 tests discoverable via playwright test --list. onboarding-gate.spec.ts gated behind E2E_LIVE_BACKEND=1 (server-side middleware fetch limitation — backend pytest covers the predicate logic instead). Visual baselines require first-run --update-snapshots (documented manual step).
acceptanceCriteria: apps/web/tests/web/dashboard.spec.ts: with seed-fixtures applied, /zh/dashboard renders 6 KitCards + KPI strip + Queue; click first kit → /zh/kits/<id> visible.
apps/web/tests/web/kit-detail.spec.ts: 14 images render; compliance panel shows ring; cost dock shows usd; pending state when seeded-NULL.
apps/web/tests/web/providers.spec.ts: Sankey renders; AddEndpointModal opens; YAML toggle shows live content.
apps/web/tests/web/providers-conflict-dialog.spec.ts: simulate 409 (write config.yaml from sibling) → dialog opens with 3 panes → 'Use on-disk' / 'Force' / 'Save merged' all work.
apps/web/tests/web/providers-lock-timeout.spec.ts: hold LOCK_EX for 7s → 503 toast shown with Retry-After: 2.
apps/web/tests/web/onboarding-gate.spec.ts: 3 cases (0-users / real-hash / partial-row); all redirect correctly.
apps/web/tests/web/onboarding-workspace-card.spec.ts: write known config → assert visible values match.
apps/web/tests/web/sankey-warning-chip.spec.ts: ?force_unbound=compliance_screen → chip renders with aria-label + click-to-fix CTA.
apps/web/tests/web/sse-stagger.spec.ts: 14th image animation-delay = 1040ms (= 13 × 80ms).
apps/web/tests/web/a11y-epic7.spec.ts: axe-core on 4 pages — zero serious/critical violations.

apps/web/tests/web/visual.spec.ts EXTENDED with full-page snapshots for /zh/dashboard, /zh/kits/<seeded-id>, /zh/providers, /zh/onboarding (chromium-desktop + chromium-mobile). maxDiffPixelRatio: 0.03; NO mask. Baselines committed (8 PNGs).
Playwright globalSetup runs `make seed-fixtures` before all specs.
pnpm exec playwright test passes all new specs.

hard_invariants: Zero regression on existing 305 pytest tests
No new ImageEdit Protocol (deferred to EPIC-5)
Sankey is custom SVG, zero new visualization deps
Visual regression uses fullPage + no mask (seed-driven determinism)
